Machine Software Interrupt Pending

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x4
Source:
clint_rf.rdl

Description

Writing 1 to bit 0 asserts the machine software interrupt for Hart 0. Writing 0 clears it.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:1] reserved rw 0x0 -
[0] msip rw - -
